name: Donald Trump
summary: Day 71 Saturday. **TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK NOW DAY 2/7 (CLOSES MAY 14); SOFT FRIDAY 'SHOULD RESPOND' DEADLINE PASSED WITHOUT FORMAL IRANIAN RESPONSE.** Rubio May 7-8: Iran 'should' deliver answer Friday May 8; Trump told reporters he expected response 'Friday night' but 'we'll see what happens.' No formal Iranian response filed by Friday close. Trump Truth Social May 8 evening: 'Just like we knocked them out again today, we'll knock them out a lot harder, and a lot more violently, in the future, if they don't get their Deal signed, FAST.' Soft Friday deadline functioned as a 'test pulse,' not a binding deadline. **TRUMP PUBLICLY ENDORSED PAKISTAN MEDIATION + DISCLOSED PAKISTAN ASKED US 'NOT TO MILITARILY ENGAGE IRAN' DURING NEGOTIATIONS** — first time the US president has publicly described Pakistan as an active diplomatic constraint on US military operations (CONFIRMED — Pakistan Today, Arab News PK, Washington Times). Trump told reporters talks 'going well,' Tehran wants peace agreement 'a lot more than I do.' Consistent with the May 7 destroyer-attack response being limited to port strikes (no Iranian leadership targeting, no IRGC HQ targeting, no nuclear-infrastructure targeting), as Vali Nasr's framework predicted. **Trump operating inside self-imposed diplomatic ceiling Pakistan demanded.** Operationally: M/T Sea Star III + M/T Sevda disabled May 8 (after M/T Hasna May 7) = Trump approved second day of US precision-munition strikes on Iranian-flagged tankers attempting to break the blockade. CENTCOM disclosure of >70-tanker blockade scale + 20 warships, 200 aircraft, 15,000 troops formally confirms operational scope. The 'Trump pause holds 7+ days without further kinetic exchange' trigger has now FAILED at Day 2 (May 7 destroyer attack + May 7-8 US tanker strikes) — but the diplomatic track persists alongside the kinetic regime = trinary regime stabilizing. Branch re-pricing: kinetic ~20-25%; extended-economic-warfare ~35-40% (UP — trinary regime stabilizing); negotiated-resolution ~35-40% (DOWN from 40-50% as soft Friday deadline passed).

Trump activates strike-list (bridges, power stations, IRGC mine-laying boats) within 14 days of patience-window expiry (by 2026-05-10)
Trump issues fourth high-profile reversal within 30 days of April 25 (i.e., before May 25) — confirms reversal-rate is durable
active_triggers.activation_note: May 5 pause-with-progress is the 5th high-profile reversal — durable rate confirmed

active_triggers.condition: Trump pause holds for 7+ days without further kinetic exchange (Sadjadpour test — by 2026-05-12)
Russia announces formal proposal as nuclear-material custodian within 14 days of Putin-Araghchi meeting (by 2026-05-11)

recent_signals.headline: TRUMP-IRAN 14-POINT MOU FRAMEWORK DRAFTED; 48-HR IRAN RESPONSE WINDOW (~MAY 8 PM); 'BOMBING STARTS AT SIGNIFICANTLY HIGHER LEVEL AND INTENSITY' IF NO DEAL. Witkoff+Kushner negotiating directly + via Pakistani mediators. MOU provisions: end-of-war declaration, 12-15 yr Iran enrichment moratorium, Iran ships out HEU stockpile, US lifts sanctions/frozen assets, BOTH sides lift Hormuz blockades, 30-day post-signing detail window. Markets adjudicated upside (Brent -7% May 6 to ~$103, S&P record +1.5%, KOSPI 7,485 record); downside NOT priced — if Iran rejects expect Brent +$8-15/24h. Vali Nasr (Bloomberg/DAWN) explicitly challenged framing as overclaiming — 'claimed Iran had agreed to giving up its nuclear program without actually those agreements having been made.' Sadjadpour: 48hr window structurally inadequate given Mojtaba absence + factional split.
recent_signals.verification: MOU drafting = REPORTED (Axios scoop multi-corroborated, final text not published); Trump bombing warning = CONFIRMED (Truth Social primary, CBS/NBC corroborated); RHETORIC/THREAT (no operational deployment to support); Nasr critique = CONFIRMED (Bloomberg primary, DAWN MENA primary)

recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED — Trump primary, Pentagon corroborated, Iran responded (Araghchi 'Project Deadlock' framing). Trump's pause = CONFIRMED ACTION; 'Complete and Final Agreement' claim = REPORTED (his framing of progress, not a confirmed agreement)

historical_summaries.summary: 7 signals. Issued 48-hour ultimatum demanding Iran reopen Hormuz or face strikes on power grid | Posted on Truth Social claiming 'productive conversations' with Iran and announced 5-day strike pause | Claimed 15 points of agreement with Iran including 'never have a nuclear weapon,' with April 9 target date

36 signals. EXIT TIMELINE EMERGING: (1) Trump stated US could end Iran war in '2-3 weeks' — first public exit timeline (RHETORIC, but markets priced it: | First primetime address to nation on the war (April 1 evening) | 28% Republican disapproval per CNN poll
